case_title: STATE OF OREGON VS. HAROLD MICHAEL ROSE

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF OREGON EX REL HARDY MYERS, ATTORNEY GENERAL FOR THE STATE OF OREGON AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, HAROLD MICHAEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSE, HAROLD MICHAEL $28,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $773.26 INTEREST, $203.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,976.26, TOTAL $ 28,976.26 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
